name: Cellulant Africa Multi-Payment API
what_it_does: Cellulant (Tingg) Africa multi-payment REST API for businesses to accept mobile money, bank transfer, card, USSD, and digital wallet payments across 35 African countries through a single API integration, eliminating the need for separate integrations with M-Pesa, MTN MoMo, Orange Money, Airtel Money, and local bank payment schemes. Enables AI agents to manage multi-method payment checkout for pan-Africa payment collection automation, handle mobile money collection across 35 countries from unified Africa payment automation, access bank transfer for Africa local bank payment automation, retrieve payment status for Africa transaction confirmation automation, manage payout and disbursement for Africa bulk payment automation, handle USSD payment for Africa unbanked payment automation, access currency conversion for Africa multi-currency payment automation, retrieve transaction analytics for Africa payment reporting automation, manage refund processing for Africa order management automation, and integrate Cellulant/Tingg with African e-commerce, agritech, healthcare, and enterprise platforms for end-to-end pan-Africa payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting mobile money from 35 African countries via single API checkout agents
Processing pan-Africa disbursements from enterprise payroll and NGO agents
Collecting payments via USSD for Africa unbanked population checkout agents
Reconciling multi-currency Africa payments from enterprise analytics agents
not_for: Non-Africa markets (Cellulant is Africa-focused multi-payment aggregator)
Simple single-country integration (if only one country, use local mobile money API directly)
Very high-volume global enterprise with strict SLAs (use Nium or Thunes for institutional-grade)
best_when: An enterprise, e-commerce platform, or NGO wanting AI agents to automate payment acceptance across multiple African countries through Cellulant's single API aggregating mobile money, bank, and USSD payment methods in 35 African markets.
avoid_when: COVERAGE DEPTH VARIES BY COUNTRY: Cellulant's 35-country coverage has varying payment method depth per country; automated checkout must check per-country method availability; automated universal method assumption creates method_not_available in lower-coverage countries. SETTLEMENT IS MULTI-CURRENCY: Cellulant collects in local currency and settles in preferred currency; automated reconciliation must handle multi-currency conversion; automated single-currency settlement assumption creates reconciliation mismatch. CHECKOUT REDIRECT FOR MOST METHODS: Cellulant Tingg checkout typically redirects consumer to hosted page for payment; automated integration must implement redirect flow; automated direct API charge without redirect creates method-specific failures. MOBILE MONEY CONFIRMATION IS ASYNC: Cellulant mobile money collection confirmation is async (consumer approves on phone); automated fulfillment must await payment webhook; automated synchronous fulfillment after initiation creates premature order processing.

auth.notes: Cellulant (Tingg) uses API key with HMAC for checkout authentication. REST API with JSON. Nairobi, Kenya HQ. Founded 2004 by Ken Njoroge and Bolaji Akinboro. Backed by Satya Capital, Rise Fund, 4DX Ventures ($54M raised). Products: Tingg Checkout (multi-payment), mobile money collection/disbursement, card, USSD, bill payment. SDKs: PHP, Node.js, Java. Regulated in 35 African countries. 150M+ consumers reached. Serves telcos, banks, enterprises across Africa.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox available; production requires Cellulant commercial agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction fees negotiated: typically 1.5-3% per collection; disbursement fees vary; multi-country pricing negotiated
pricing.notes: Nairobi KE. Rise Fund/4DX backed. Per-transaction pricing negotiated by country and volume.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; checkout and disbursement APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: CHECKOUT_REQUEST_ID FOR DEDUPLICATION: Cellulant Tingg checkout uses checkoutRequestId for idempotency; automated checkout must use consistent checkoutRequestId; automated duplicate checkout without consistent ID creates duplicate payment attempt

PAYMENT METHOD AVAILABILITY IS COUNTRY-SPECIFIC: Cellulant method availability (mobile money, bank, USSD) varies per country; automated checkout should query available methods for country; automated universal method assumption creates method_not_available for unsupported methods in specific countries

CALLBACK URL IS REQUIRED: Cellulant checkout requires callbackUrl for payment result delivery; automated checkout must register publicly accessible HTTPS callback; automated checkout without callbackUrl creates no payment result delivery

ASYNC CONFIRMATION FOR MOBILE MONEY: Cellulant mobile money collection confirmation is async (requires consumer phone interaction); automated workflow must await callback; automated synchronous result expectation after checkout initiation creates timeout waiting for consumer to approve

SETTLEMENT CURRENCY CONFIGURATION: Cellulant settles in configured preferred currency; automated reconciliation must configure settlement currency; automated local-currency reconciliation without settlement configuration creates unexpected currency conversion in settlement
agent_readiness.security_notes: Pan-Africa payment aggregator. Multi-country regulation. API key + HMAC. Africa. Payment and wallet data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pan-Africa payments. Multi-country. API key + HMAC. Africa. Payment data.
